text.title: Spring Boot Layered Architecture Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to scaffold a Spring Boot 3 layered service end-to-end.

step.name: add-controller
step.action: Add `@RestController` under `Features/<Feature>/`. Annotate inputs with `@Valid` + Bean Validation. Inject the service; return record DTOs.
step.decision-gate: If a method returns an entity, BLOCK per `dto-record-never-entity` rule.

step.name: add-service-with-transactional
step.action: Add `@Service` class; annotate class `@Transactional(readOnly = true)`; override on writes with `@Transactional`. Inject `PasswordEncoder` for password hashing.
step.decision-gate: If a write method lacks `@Transactional`, BLOCK per `transactional-on-writes` rule.

step.name: add-repository
step.action: Add `JpaRepository<Entity, Long>` subinterface. Add custom JPQL only where derived queries fall short. Use `Specification` for complex filters. List queries return `Page<Entity>`.
step.decision-gate: If list query returns `List` without `Pageable`, BLOCK per `pageable-on-list` rule.

step.name: wire-mapstruct-and-dto
step.action: Define record DTO; add `@Mapper(componentModel = "spring") interface FooMapper`. Verify the MapStruct annotation processor is configured. Map inside service before returning.

step.name: add-global-exception-advice-and-tests
step.action: Add `@RestControllerAdvice` mapping `ResourceNotFoundException` → 404, `ValidationException` → 400, etc., into RFC 7807 ProblemDetail. Add controller/service tests per `java-junit-testing`.
